title: Alex's Mods
description: A Light Modpack Based Around Alexander Mobiles Mods
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b67e115900b7779775745e86ba99e6f33a1c78ce.png)
**This Modpack Is Not Associated With Alex, All Credit Goes To Him For His Mods**
# Features
- New Giant Cave Biomes (Alex's Caves)
- Dozens Of New Mobs Across Dimesions (Alex's Mobs)
- Mass Storage (Cloud Storage)
- Complex Rat Mobs (Rats)
- Rideable Skateboards (I Wanna Skate)
- Improved Vanilla Pets (Domestication Innovation)
- New Mediumcore Difficulty (Mediumcore)
- Optimization Improvements (Embeddium & More)
##   Warning
- Not Intended To Play With Shaders As They Cause Issues With Alex's Caves And Alex's Mobs For Best Experience Play Without Shaders
## Credit
- [Alexmodguy](https://modrinth.com/mods?q=alexmodguy)
